title: TeamInvite
description: An outstanding or completed invitation to join a workspace as admin or member. Produced + consumed by the team-invite skill. Source of truth for the team_invites D1 table.

id.description: Stable invite id, e.g. inv_<random>. Used in event payloads + email link.

inviter_user_id.description: Must hold owner or admin role on the org at invite-time.

invitee_role.description: owner is intentionally absent — ownership transfer is a separate flow.

token_hash.description: SHA-256 base64url hash of the plaintext token. Plaintext only exists in the email; never persisted.

expires_at.description: 14 days from creation by default. Acceptance after this fails closed.

revoked_at.description: Set when inviter cancels before acceptance. Invite row archived but never deleted.

accepted_user_id.description: User id created (or matched) at acceptance time. Joins organization_members on org_id + this user_id.

metadata.description: Optional extras: invite source (UI / API / MCP), inviter display name for the email subject, custom message.
